tags.name: CASCADE_INIT
tags.note: Daemon process started; config loaded; backend selected.

tags.name: CONFIG_VALIDATED
tags.note: Config.from_env() returned successfully. has_guild_id is bool — DM-only deployments may legitimately have it false.

tags.name: CONFIG_VALIDATION_FAILED
tags.note: MissingEnvError raised during Config.from_env(). Daemon will not start.

tags.name: BRIDGE_HEALTHY
tags.note: GET /health returned. Use discord_ready to gate /imagine submissions.

tags.name: DISCORD_CONNECTED
tags.note: discord.py-self WebSocket handshake completed; on_ready fired.

tags.name: IMAGINE_FIRED
tags.note: POST /imagine accepted by the bridge and Discord interaction sent. upscale is null|'1'|'2'|'3'|'4'|'all'.

tags.name: GRID_MATCHED
tags.note: MJ message matched to job. match_path is 'pending' (first-touch) or 'progress_fallback' (v7 grid-as-new-message — the the default patch path).

tags.name: UPSCALE_REQUESTED
tags.note: Upscale button (U1-U4) pressed via Discord interaction. slot is 1-4.

tags.name: UPSCALE_RECEIVED
tags.note: Single upscale PNG downloaded to disk.

tags.name: JOB_COMPLETED
tags.note: Job hit DONE — all expected artifacts on disk.

tags.name: JOB_FAILED
tags.note: Job hit FAILED. error_code is a stable string; known values: DISCORD_400_OUTDATED, DISCORD_401, DISCORD_400_UNKNOWN_CHANNEL, GRID_DOWNLOAD_FAILED, UPSCALE_DOWNLOAD_FAILED, MJ_UUID_MISSING, SUBMIT_FAILED.

tags.name: BACKEND_HTTP_CALLED
tags.note: MidjourneyDiscordBackend made an HTTP call to the bridge daemon. Useful for grading the client-side, not just the daemon.
